title: elaeocarpus harmandii
intro: Elaeocarpus harmandii, also known as the Harmand's blue bean, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. It is a tree that is native to Vietnam and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus harmandii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. Elaeocarpus harmandii can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, although its availability and usage may be limited due to its rarity and limited research.
